judgment.summary: Rapidly growing, highly profitable company with strong cash flow, albeit trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 18.1%; next earnings date is 2026-08-03.
positives: Revenue growth 84.7% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Operating margin 46.2% and Profit margin 43.7% — industry-leading profitability.
Return on equity 32.6% — very efficient use of shareholder capital.
Free cash flow $1.75B TTM — strong cash generation.
Consensus rating is 'buy' with a mean target of $183.73.
negatives: Trailing P/E 153.90 and Forward P/E 66.03 — valuation is very stretched.
PEG ratio 1.95 — growth may not fully justify the current multiple.
Debt/Equity 2.48 — leverage is notable, though offset by strong cash.

news.paragraph: Jim Cramer described Palantir as an "incredibly good company" whose stock has gotten ahead of itself, suggesting a potential disconnect between fundamental value and market price. This commentary comes as the stock trades at a significant premium, with high multiples across P/E, P/B, and P/S ratios. Traders should consider whether the recent price appreciation is sustainable given the valuation, ahead of the August earnings report.

headlines.title: Jim Cramer on Palantir: “Incredibly Good Company Whose Stock Got Ahead”
